title: *** Origins
description:
Super Extra Xtreme Origins
(They didnt let me use the acronym)
body:
Just a few origins I half made, half "borrowed" that I packed up for a modpack.
These are origins supposed to be limited to 1 player each, that I made from request and design made by the oomfies.

Adds 3 new origins.
- The Goblin
- The Dwarf
- The Stargazer

These 3 origins are made by me, with some code tweaked from other origins and by the nice people at the origins mod discord.
